query:
INSERT INTO agent_metrics (agentId, tasksCompleted, successRate, avgLatency, errorRate, updatedAt)
SELECT id, 0, 95.00, averageLatency, 0.00, NOW()
FROM agents
WHERE agentName IN ('Market Research Agent', 'Financial Analysis Agent', 'Strategy Agent', 'Legal Review Agent', 'Report Writer Agent');
